form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 485m at Horsham beaten 11 lengths (28.06) behind Keen On Kev in a Grade 5 on April 9. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Comes off a (25.83) win last time, scoring by 2.75 lengths in a T3 RSTW over 450m at Ballarat. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 19.54 with a 2 length win at Healesville over 350m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with him.
